questions.question: List four key advantages of using SDLC
Differentiate between Alpha and Beta testing
keyPoints: Alpha: Conducted internally by development team
Beta: Real users test in production-like environment
Alpha focuses on functionality; Beta on user experience

questions.question: Compare Waterfall and Agile models, highlighting scenarios where each is preferable
keyPoints: Waterfall: Stable requirements, regulated industries (banking), clear documentation needs
Agile: Changing requirements, customer collaboration, rapid delivery needs
Comparison of documentation, flexibility, and risk management approaches

questions.question: Explain the significance of traceability matrix in SDLC with a healthcare system example
keyPoints: Critical for audit trails in patient data systems
Example: HIPAA requirements mapping to security tests
